title: Make smoothies
description: ***Welcome to our smoothies empire, where you can make the best smoothies! Once your smoothies is done, use our decorating stuff that can turn smoothies into tasty and yummy desserts! Do the same thing with a smoothies cups – decorate them with different straws and stickers. Make smoothies look lovable. Isn't this one of the best desserts games ever or what?! ***Perform as a smoothies maker and let others taste your yummy desserts! Enjoy making and serving smoothies to the others and become the chef of your smoothies bar! Don't hesitate and download this making desserts game, there aren't many games like this, we assure you! ***FEATURES * Easy to use interface! * It's so fun to make smoothies - do it step by step! * Select ingredients: you're the one to choose what goes into your desserts! * Make endless combinations: fruits and chocolate, veggies and nuts... Try out making different combinations of desserts! * Choose the color and design of your smoothies making them desirable! *Blend ingredients: turn fresh ingredients into healthy meals or tasty desserts - so easy to make! * Make your smoothies look fancy from the outside too – design your desserts cup! * Making desserts has never been so easy, face it! How many games can you provide all this?! Just one! ***Don't waste time thinking, just do it! Making and decorating smoothies is waiting for you! Make your desserts the best of the best! Download the one of the best making smoothies games!
